results.justification: Physical statue transport, not parameter optimization.
Orthogonalizes the gradient (Muon-style); MPOO is orthogonal-TO the gradient. Related but not identical mechanism.
Paper describes precisely the slow-fast decomposition where 1-D backbone drift + high-dim transverse oscillation IS the optimizer dynamics — same operational mechanism as MPOO.
Large-lr SGD's lateral oscillation is shown to be both intrinsic to and beneficial for generalization — functional equivalent of MPOO's lateral-rocking-only descent claim.
Argues momentum marginal in many settings; not the same mechanism but adjacent finding.
Updates projected orthogonal to retained-direction gradient; same family as MPOO's transverse-step rule.
Decomposes training into intrinsic-direction + transverse-direction dynamics — matches MPOO's intrinsic-lean + transverse-rocking decomposition.
